summary: Completed testing of Pre-Match Win Confidence Prediction feature for IPL 2026. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend MatchSelector shows confidence bars on predicted matches with 'PREDICT ALL (N LEFT)' button. PreMatch page displays full PreMatchPredictionBreakdown component with 5 weighted factors (H2H 25%, Venue 20%, Form 25%, Squad 20%, Home 10%), direction bars, and key players.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns version 4.0.0 with 'Gamble Consultant API'
GET /api/schedule returns loaded schedule with 70 matches
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_008/pre-match-predict returns cached result in <0.2s
Prediction includes all 5 factors: h2h, venue, form, squad, home_advantage
Factor weights sum to 1.0 (25% + 20% + 25% + 20% + 10%)
H2H factor includes team1_wins, team2_wins, total_matches
Venue factor includes avg_score, win_pct for both teams
Form factor includes last5_wins, last5_win_pct for both teams
Squad factor includes batting_rating, bowling_rating for both teams
GET /api/predictions/upcoming returns 3+ stored predictions
Predictions include raw stats data (h2h, venue_stats, form, squad_strength)
GET /api/schedule still works
GET /api/squads still works
GET /api/matches/{id}/state still works
GET /api/cricket-api/usage still works
POST /api/matches/{id}/consult still works
POST /api/matches/{id}/predict still works
Frontend MatchSelector shows confidence bars on predicted matches
Frontend shows 'PREDICT ALL (58 LEFT)' button on Upcoming tab
Clicking match card navigates to PreMatch page
PreMatch page shows PreMatchPredictionBreakdown component
Factor breakdown shows all 5 factors with correct weights
Direction bars show which team has advantage per factor
Key Players section displays player names for both teams
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: 3 pre-match predictions cached: ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC), ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT), ipl2026_010 (LSG vs SRH)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-match prediction feature fully working. 3 predictions cached in MongoDB. Cached predictions return instantly (<0.2s). New predictions take 15-30s due to GPT-5.4 web search. DO NOT call /api/schedule/predict-upcoming as it processes ALL matches sequentially. Use individual /api/matches/{id}/pre-match-predict for testing. The PreMatchPredictionBreakdown component shows 5 weighted factors with direction bars.

endpoints_tested.POST /api/matches/{id}/pre-match-predict: PASS - Returns prediction with factors breakdown
endpoints_tested.POST /api/schedule/predict-upcoming: NOT TESTED - Would be very slow (processes all matches)

frontend_components.ConfidenceBar: PASS - Shows on match cards with team percentages
frontend_components.PredictAllButton: PASS - Shows 'PREDICT ALL (N LEFT)' on Upcoming tab
frontend_components.PreMatchPredictionBreakdown: PASS - Full factor breakdown with direction bars
frontend_components.KeyPlayers: PASS - Shows key players for both teams
